title: Happy Birdie Golf Pop-Up Greeting Card Original Second Nature 3D Pop Up Cards
features: This unique elasticated 3D Birthday card automatically jumps to life when removed from it's envelope
The Pop Ups can be used for so much more, why not use them as part of a table arrangement to hold a balloon, or as part of a floral arrangement?
It is "driven" with an elastic band which "triggers" the Pop Up to instantly open when removed from it's envelope
The card can be easily closed by pinching the finger guides marked on either side
Gift Tag & small side panel available for your hand written personal message
description: Product Description This unique elasticated 3D Birthday card automatically jumps to life when removed from it's envelope for those occasions where you really want to show someone they are special and with your added special message, it is not just a Birthday card it is a wonderful personal gift to treasure. This Birthday Pop Up has been beautifully created with "Happy Birdie" lettering and a Golf Clubs design. The Pop Ups can be used for so much more, why not use them as part of a table arrangement to hold a balloon, or as part of a floral arrangement? Let your imagination run wild. This amazing card was designed in the UK and uses over 50 folds and cuts and small hand added elements to create a beautiful range of designs. It is "driven" with an elastic band which "triggers" the Pop Up to instantly open when removed from it's envelope. The card can be easily closed by pinching the finger guides marked on either side and once closed you are able to write your message and place in it's envelope for posting. We hope you enjoy sending them as much as we enjoyed making them! Pop Ups are approx 20cm x 20cm open and approx 18cm x 12cm closed. For ages 5+ due to small parts. Legal Disclaimer Not suitable for children below 5 years of age due to small parts
